question: Cloud-based vs. on-premises attacks
canonical_answer:
Cloud: Offsite, usually managed by third party, lower cost, no data centers, limited downtime
On-premises attack: On-site, full control of data, system check can occur at anytime, high cost and time consumption

appears_in.title: Comptia Exam Objectives Security+
appears_in.answer:
Data center employees are there solely to protect your data.

Keep data secure with high efficiency from the start
